response: The serum and follicular fluid (FF) levels of 25OH-VD, and FF levels of TNF-α, 25OH-VD, and TAC were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions and were read using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader. Human serum 25-OHVD levels were measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. [REDACTED], [REDACTED]) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (16). Human serum TNF-α levels were measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. [REDACTED], [REDACTED]) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (17). Human serum TAC levels were measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. [REDACTED], [REDACTED]) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (18).
